calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-17-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-06-2013 Continued To Jun-17-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Next Accounting
Off Calendar Feb-25-2013 Off Calendar

First Account And Report Of Trustee And Petition For Approval
Off Calendar Jan-07-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kenneth Horowitz for Petitioner.

The Court stated that we now have consent from the holder of the Power of Attorney (POA) for the Benficiary's Attorney allowing the accounting. Mr. Horowitz stated that he believes they will have a more current accounting (through March 31, 2011) filed within the next six weeks. The Court will allow the accounting (subject to review of the order). Status on filing of the next accounting was set for February 25, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

First Account And Report Of Trustee And Petition For Approval
Off Calendar Nov-26-2012 Continued To Jan-07-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kenneth Horowitz for Comerica Bank (Petitioner).

Counsel addressed issues raised in the Examiner's notes with regard to who has standing to speak for Masa, signing the Powers of Attorney and the Bank's failure to provide an accounting when ordered. Request to terminate and disslove the Trust is not before the Court. The matter was continued to January 7, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

First Account And Report Of Trustee And Petition For Approval
Off Calendar Oct-15-2012 Continued To Nov-26-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

First Account And Report Of Trustee And Petition For Approval
Off Calendar Aug-20-2012 Continued To Oct-15-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kenneth Horowitz for Comerica Bank & Trust.

The Court stated that something has to happen to make sure Masa's assets are protected and that Masa's interests are being represented. Mr. Horowitz addressed the issue of a Guardian Ad Litem, stated that he did not know if Masa has capacity to sign a Power of Attorney, that he can have her examined by a Doctor to see if she has capacity or look into appointing her Husband as Guardian Ad Litem in this matter. In addition, Counsel stated that the Trustee did not realize that they needed to do accountings, that he will file another accounting this year to bring it up to date and that he brought a copy of the Asset Management description. Furthermore, Counsel agreed that there were absorbent amounts of transactions in the investment, stated that there were no transaction charges and that he will file a supplemental declaration with regard to this issue. The matter was continued to October 15, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the issue of Beneficiary capacity and representation.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

First Account And Report Of Trustee And Petition For Approval
Off Calendar Jul-17-2012 Continued To Aug-20-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

First Account And Report Of Trustee And Petition For Approval
Off Calendar Jun-12-2012 Continued To Jul-17-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
